sections.title: Getting Started
sections.summary: Your first ten minutes in BuildOS — sign up, capture a project, and see how the pieces fit together.

sections.title: The BuildOS Ontology
sections.summary: Projects, tasks, plans, documents, goals — the semantic model behind everything in BuildOS.

sections.title: Brain Dump & Voice Notes
sections.summary: Capture messy thinking in text or voice; BuildOS structures it into project memory.

sections.title: Agentic Chat
sections.summary: The in-app agent that reads, writes, searches, and schedules across your projects.

sections.title: Projects, Tasks & Plans
sections.summary: Organize work into projects with tasks, plans, documents, and goals.

sections.title: Calendar & Time Blocks
sections.summary: Turn tasks into scheduled work with Google Calendar and the time-blocks surface.

sections.title: Daily Briefs
sections.summary: Project-aware briefs delivered by email, SMS, and in-app — with a chat that acts on them.

sections.title: Notifications
sections.summary: Multi-channel notifications: in-app, push, email, and SMS.

sections.title: Connect External Agents
sections.summary: Let Claude Code, OpenClaw, or a custom agent read and write to your BuildOS project context.

sections.title: Reference & Help
sections.summary: FAQ, contact, feedback, and other places to go when you need more.
